title: Auction of 91-Day, 182-Day and 364-Day Treasury Bills
description: Reserve Bank of India announces the auction of Government of India Treasury Bills as per the following details: Sr. No. Treasury Bill Notified Amount (₹ crore) Auction Date Settlement Date 1 91-Day 12,000 April 22, 2026 (Wednesday) April 23, 2026 (Thursday) 2 182-Day 6,000 3 364-Day 6,000   Total 24,000     The sale will be subject to the terms and conditions specified in the General Notification F.No.4(2)-B(W&M)/2018 dated March 26, 2025, issued by Government of India,
